## Summary

- describe the main change in 1-3 bullets

## Validation

- [ ] `make auto-local`
- [ ] `make pr-doctor -- --strict`
- [ ] PR checks are green before `make pr-land`
- [ ] any extra targeted check worth calling out

## Release Notes

- staging impact:
- operator/admin impact:
- follow-up risk or rollback note:

## Split Check

- [ ] this branch still feels like one coherent review unit
- [ ] if large, the split decision is explained in the PR body
